title: Sulla Routine Document
description: Schema for a Routine — the DAG document authored on the Sulla canvas. The same document shape is stored as JSONB in the Postgres `workflows.definition` column and is serialized as `routine.yaml` for export/import. Mirrors the `WorkflowDefinition` TypeScript interface in pkg/rancher-desktop/pages/editor/workflow/types.ts.

id.description: Unique identifier for the routine. Typically 'workflow-<kebab-slug>' or 'routine-<kebab-slug>'.

description.description: What the routine does and when it runs. Read by the workflow registry + LLM.

version.description: Document schema version. Bump if the routine document shape changes in a breaking way.

type.description: vue-flow node type. `workflow`/`routine` are executable graph nodes (differentiated further via `data.subtype`). `loop-frame` is a container that parents body nodes via `parentNode`. `sticky-note` is a non-executing canvas annotation.

width.description: Persisted node width. Required for resizable types (loop-frame, sticky-note); optional elsewhere.

height.description: Persisted node height. Required for resizable types.

zIndex.description: VueFlow render order. Sticky notes use a negative zIndex so they sit behind executable nodes.

parentNode.description: ID of a containing node (currently only loop-frame). When set, `position` is parent-local.

nodeData.description: Persistent node data. `execution` state is runtime-only and MUST NOT appear in exports. `label` and `config` are required for executable nodes but optional for annotation types like sticky notes.

subtype.description: Drawn from WorkflowNodeSubtype. `function` invokes a function at ~/sulla/functions/<slug>/ via the matching runtime container. `sticky-note` is a canvas annotation and never executes.

category.description: High-level role. `annotation` marks nodes the DAG walker must skip (sticky notes).

config.description: Per-subtype config. Shape depends on `subtype` — see the per-subtype config interfaces in pkg/rancher-desktop/pages/editor/workflow/types.ts (TriggerNodeConfig, AgentNodeConfig, FunctionNodeConfig, RouterNodeConfig, ...). Not required for sticky notes.

content.description: Sticky-note only. Markdown body of the note (GFM + line breaks). Rendered through DOMPurify on display; YouTube/Vimeo/video URLs on their own line auto-embed as iframes/video tags. Image references may be absolute HTTPS URLs or `sulla-routine-asset://<slug>/<file>` paths resolving into the routine template's `assets/` folder.

bgColor.description: Sticky-note only. Background fill as a CSS color string (typically rgba). Empty/omitted = use the default steel-blue. UI picker ships 7 presets but any valid CSS color persists.
